uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.JavaHierarchyNode

Packages that use JavaHierarchyNode
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java
Provides Java-specific toolkits that leverage the NetBeans Java Source and Parsing APIs.

    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java that return JavaHierarchyNode
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JavaHierarchyNode
    CodeModel.getSubtypes(JavaType javaType, Integer maxDepth)
    Recursively searches for all subtypes (implementations and subclasses) of a given JavaType.
    JavaHierarchyNode
    CodeModel.getSubtypesByFqn(String fqn, Integer maxDepth)
    Recursively searches for all subtypes of a type specified by its fully qualified name.
    JavaHierarchyNode
    CodeModel.getSupertypes(JavaType javaType, Integer maxDepth)
    Recursively searches for all supertypes (base classes and interfaces) of a given JavaType.
    JavaHierarchyNode
    CodeModel.getSupertypesByFqn(String fqn, Integer maxDepth)
    Recursively searches for all supertypes of a type specified by its fully qualified name.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    JavaSubtypeSearch.buildSubtypeTree(org.netbeans.api.java.source.CompilationInfo info, TypeElement te, JavaHierarchyNode node, int depth, Set<String> visited)
    Recursively builds the subtype tree using the NetBeans ClassIndex.
    private void
    JavaSupertypeSearch.buildSupertypeTree(org.netbeans.api.java.source.CompilationInfo info, TypeElement te, JavaHierarchyNode node, int depth, Set<String> visited)
    Recursively builds the supertype tree by traversing direct supertypes (class and interfaces).
